publishedAbstract: * How to Specify datastores for the vSphere volume plugin during an OCS 4 installation or scale-up procedure * Before OCS v4.6, all the PVs in OpenShift Container Storage get created on the default datastore in vSphere. * There is no mechanism to configure OCS storage to use multiple vSphere datastores. * With OCS v4.6, the OCP UI adds a capability to choose the StorageClass during the scale-up or installation operation.
publishedTitle: Specifying datastores for the vSphere volume plugin during an OCS 4 installation or scale-up procedure
